entries.title: White House Adviser Says Trump Won’t Create ‘FDA for AI’

entries.title: Prediction Markets Score Thanks to World Cup’s Popularity
entries.summary: Prediction markets have reportedly seen a surge in trading volume thanks to the World Cup. Kalshi saw more than $31 billion in notional volume in June, a 70% increase from May, CNBC reported Saturday (July 4), citing Dune Analytics. The platform has consistently seen volumes of more than $1 billion each day since the tournament […] The post Prediction Markets Score Thanks to World Cup’

entries.title: Crypto Use Among Rogue States Jumped Eightfold in 2025
entries.summary: Countries sanctioned by the U.S. have reportedly increased their use of cryptocurrencies. Iran, North Korea, Russia and other sanctioned nations handled more than $100 billion in crypto just in 2025, The Wall Street Journal (WSJ) reported Saturday (July 4), citing industry estimates. entries.title: LexisNexis and Promon Help Brands Fight Rising Mobile App Fraud
entries.summary: LexisNexis Risk Solutions and Promon are working together to help organizations protect their mobile apps from fraud. The companies’ new alliance brings together LexisNexis ThreatMetrix digital identity, device and behavioral intelligence; Promon Shield in-app protection; and Promon Insight trusted telemetry, they said in a Wednesday (July 1) press release. entries.title: Payward completes Reap acquistion
entries.summary: Payward, a unified financial infrastructure platform advancing an open, global financial system, today announced the completion of its acquisition of Reap Technologies Holdings Limited (“Reap”), a leading stablecoin-native, card issuing and payments infrastructure company enabling global money movement.

entries.title: Crédit Agricole buys Worldline out of merchant payments JV
entries.summary: Crédit Agricole has bought out Worldline to take 100% ownership of Cawl, the merchant payment services joint venture the two established in 2023. Financial terms were not disclosed.

entries.title: Financial platform for immigrants LemFi buys Wealth8
entries.summary: LemFi, a Nigerian-founded financial services fintech for immigrant communities, has received the green light from UK regulators to buy investment platform Wealth8.
